nasb.text: He said, “Go, and tell this people: ‘Keep on listening, but do not perceive; Keep on looking, but do not understand.’

esv.text: And he said, “Go, and say to this people: “‘Keep on hearing, but do not understand; keep on seeing, but do not perceive.’

cnv.text: 他說：“你去告訴這子民，說： ‘你們聽了又聽，卻不明白； 看了又看，卻不曉得。’

ccb.text: 祂说：“你去告诉以色列人， “‘你们听了又听，却不明白； 看了又看，却不领悟。’

csbs.text: 他说： “你去告诉这百姓说： ‘你们听了又听，却不领悟； 看了又看，却不明白。’
